title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh me, oh my! Just look at all these new faces...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I shall introduce myself to each and every one of
you once we've returned home. But first...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for bringing so many new friends into
my life, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee... My room is going to become quite lively
indeed. ♪
